messages.content: 以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：Moses 等系统的模拟了不同厚度叶片尾缘对扩压叶栅的总压损失、气流折转能力、载荷分布和尾迹损失的影响，并且得出了对压气机性能影响最小的叶片厚度

The Moses and other systems simulate the effects of different thicknesses of blade trailing edges on the total pressure loss, flow turning capability, load distribution, and wake loss of the expanding-pressure blade cascade, and have determined the blade thickness that minimizes the impact on compressor performance.
以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：Moses 等人系统的模拟了不同厚度叶片尾缘对扩压叶栅的总压损失、气流折转能力、载荷分布和尾迹损失的影响，并且得出了对压气机性能影响最小的叶片厚度

The Moses system and others simulated the impacts of varying blade trailing edge thicknesses on the total pressure loss, flow turning capability, load distribution, and wake loss of the expanding-pressure blade cascade, and determined the blade thickness that minimizes the influence on compressor performance.
以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：Moses 等人详细的模拟了不同厚度叶片尾缘对扩压叶栅的总压损失、气流折转能力、载荷分布和尾迹损失的影响，并且得出了对压气机性能影响最小的叶片厚度

Moses and his colleagues conducted a comprehensive simulation of the impact of varying blade trailing edge thicknesses on the total pressure loss, flow turning capability, load distribution, and wake loss of the expanding-pressure blade cascade. They identified the blade thickness that minimizes the effect on compressor performance.
以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：Lange 等利用数值模拟研究了叶片弦长、厚度和前缘半径的变化对压缩机等熵效率的影响，发现前缘半径的变化对压缩机等熵效率的影响最大。

Lange and his colleagues used numerical simulations to investigate the impact of variations in blade chord length, thickness, and leading edge radius on the isentropic efficiency of compressors. They found that the leading edge radius had the greatest influence on the isentropic efficiency of compressors.
以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：Wilson and Imregun通过非线性气动弹性模型研究了在不同工作状态下跨声速叶片的几何变形对叶尖相对安装角以及气动性能的影响。

Wilson and Imregun studied the effects of geometric deformations of transonic blades on the relative tip angle and aerodynamic performance under different operating conditions using a nonlinear aerodynamic-elasticity model.
以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：转子不同位置等体积掉块对跨声速压气机气动性能影响
The impact of variable-sized volume blockages at different locations on the aerodynamic performance of transonic compressors was investigated.
以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这个题目：转子不同位置等体积缺口对跨声速压气机气动性能影响损伤
The Effect of Variable-Sized Volume Gaps at Different Positions on the Aerodynamic Performance of Transonic Compressors: A Damage Assessment
以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这个题目：转子叶片不同位置相同体积缺口损伤对跨声速压气机气动性能的影响
The Impact of Identical Volume Gap Damage at Different Locations on the Aerodynamic Performance of Transonic Compressor Rotor Blades
请以SCI的标准帮我找出下面这段话的语病，并标注出来：The Impact of Identical Volume Notch Damage at Different Locations on the Aerodynamic Performance of Transonic Compressor Rotor Blades

The Impact of Identical Volume Notch Damage at Different Locations on the Aerodynamic Performance of Transonic Compressor Rotor Blades

There does not appear to be any grammatical or syntactical errors in the given sentence. However, one potential improvement could be to rephrase "The Impact of Identical Volume Notch Damage" to "The Influence of Identical Volume Notches" for a more concise and reader-friendly title.
请以SCI的标准帮我找出下面这句话的语病，并用中文标注出来：The Impact of Identical Volume Notch Damage at Different Locations on the Aerodynamic Performance of Transonic Compressor Rotor Blades

The Impact of Identical Volume Notch Damage at Different Locations on the Aerodynamic Performance of Transonic Compressor Rotor Blades

在这个句子中没有语病。
以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段话：研究分析了发生在叶片前缘和后缘的不同叶片高度的六个典型位置的等体积缺口损伤对压缩机整体性能的影响模式和机理。

The study analyzed the impact patterns and mechanisms of identical volume notch damages occurring at six typical positions of varying blade heights at the leading and trailing edges on the overall performance of the compressor.
以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段话：其中，发生在叶片前缘顶端和中部的缺口会导致压气机气动性能衰退程度巨大。
Among them, notches occurring at the leading edge tip and middle of the blade can cause a significant decline in the aerodynamic performance of the compressor.
